## Problem

What are you trying to do that Tars doesn't support today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Anything else — keeping in mind the transport boundary (`core`/`mcp` stay
transport-agnostic) and that Tars is single-user and ships empty.
